nasb.text: The words of his mouth are wickedness and deceit; He has ceased to be wise and to do good.

esv.text: The words of his mouth are trouble and deceit; he has ceased to act wisely and do good.

cnv.text: 他口中的話語都是罪惡和詭詐， 他不再是明慧的，也不再行善。

ccb.text: 他们满口恶言谎话， 毫无智慧和善行。

csbs.text: 他口中的话语充满奸恶和欺诈， 他不再有智慧，也不再行善。
